examples: The Republicans tried to trump this with their slogan.
The ceremony was disrupted by unprecedented heckling and slogan-chanting.
"the survival of the fittest," a slogan that virtually preempted all debate.
"Tell Sid" was the ad slogan for British Gas shares, not "Tell Rupert" or "Tell his Lordship".
"Get your kitsch on Route 66" might be a better slogan for Arizona's scrubby stretch of Mother Road.
